# Smart Learn

> Expert Moodle & AI Automation for Education

Smart Learn is founded by Mohammad Nabil, a top-rated freelancer and LMS architect bridging the gap between online academies and cutting-edge AI technology. Since 2020, Mohammad has been building and scaling Moodle platforms for institutions worldwide — from plugin development and migrations to full AI integration and n8n automation.
[Visit our Home Page](https://home.smartlearn.education/)

## Core Services

### 1. Moodle Installation, Migration & Maintenance
Full lifecycle Moodle management: fresh installations, version upgrades, server migrations, performance tuning, and ongoing maintenance. Everything from initial setup to disaster recovery so platforms stay online and fast.
[Learn more about Moodle Services](https://home.smartlearn.education/services/moodle-core)

### 2. Plugin Development
Custom Moodle plugin development tailored to exact requirements. With 4 free plugins published on Moodle.org and 10+ premium plugins, building activity modules, blocks, local plugins, themes, and custom integrations.
[Learn more about Plugin Development](https://home.smartlearn.education/services/plugins)

### 3. AI Integration for Moodle
Embed AI directly into the Moodle platform: RAG-powered chatbots for every course, Video-to-Text pipelines so students can query lecture content, AI-assisted grading, and LLM-based admin tools that make teaching smarter.
[Learn more about AI Integration](https://home.smartlearn.education/services/ai)

### 4. n8n Automation for Moodle
End-to-end automation using n8n and the Moodle REST API: automated grading workflows, enrollment triggers, notification pipelines, and full RAG system builds. Eliminate repetitive admin work for good.
[Learn more about n8n Automation](https://home.smartlearn.education/services/n8n)

### 5. Training & Technical Support
Practical training programs for Moodle administrators and teachers at online academies, schools, and course platforms. Ongoing technical support, documentation, troubleshooting, and remote assistance.
[Learn more about Training](https://home.smartlearn.education/services/training)

### 6. Branded Moodle Mobile App
Your Moodle platform in your students' pockets — a fully branded Android or iOS app with your logo, colors, and pre-configured login. Learners download your app and sign in directly to your LMS.
[Learn more about Mobile App](https://home.smartlearn.education/services/mobile-app)

## Fast Facts
*   **Experience:** 5+ Years
*   **Scale:** 100,000+ Users Managed
*   **Track Record:** 70+ Projects Done
*   **Community:** Recipient of the "Particularly Helpful Moodle Badge" every year from 2020–2025 on Moodle.org.

## Contact Information
*   **Location:** Egypt (Available for remote work worldwide)
*   **Response Time:** Usually under 24 hours (Monday - Saturday)
*   Please visit the contact section on the website to get in touch via email or WhatsApp.
